hero_tagline: Join me on your journey of yoga health + wellness
hero_sub: Weekly classes, private sessions, and online yoga — in Mesa, Arizona and beyond.
offerings_sub: Whether you're brand new to yoga or deepening an existing practice, there's a place for you here.

offerings.title: Mesa Community College
offerings.body: Two-credit introductory courses covering yoga history, philosophy, postures, and breath work — online and recorded so you can practice on your schedule.

offerings.title: Float Into Fitness
offerings.body: Pool yoga sessions combining the foundations of yoga with the refreshing ambiance of the water. Perfect for building flexibility, balance, and strength in a joyful setting.

offerings.title: Current Classes
offerings.body: Gentle Yoga at Sunland Springs Village — Wednesdays 8:45–10am. Designed for all fitness levels. Only $5 per class.

about_body: I'm an E-RYT500 registered yoga instructor and adjunct faculty member at Mesa Community College. I've been guiding students through yoga since 2008 — and my mission hasn't changed: to make yoga accessible, meaningful, and joyful for everyone who walks through my door (or logs on!).
newsletter_sub: Be the first to know what's going on — new classes, workshops, and all things yoga.
